| MCP:fMKRJ3 | private fun Content(

| MCP:fMKRJ3 |                             }

| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |                     }
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |                 }

| MCP:fMKRJ3 |         }
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     }

| MCP:fMKRJ3 | package com.merttoptas.composebase.features.base

| MCP:fMKRJ3 | /**

| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | abstract class BaseViewModel<State : IViewState, Event : IViewEvent> : ViewModel() {
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     private val initialState: State by lazy { createInitialState() }
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     abstract fun createInitialState(): State
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     val currentState: State get() = uiState.value
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     abstract fun onTriggerEvent(event: Event)
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     private val _uiState: MutableStateFlow<State> = MutableStateFlow(initialState)
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     val uiState: StateFlow<State> = _uiState
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     private val _uiEvent: MutableSharedFlow<Event> = MutableSharedFlow()
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     val uiEvent = _uiEvent.asSharedFlow()
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     protected fun setState(reduce: State.() -> State) {
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |         val newState = currentState.reduce()
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |         _uiState.value = newState
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     }
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     protected fun setEvent(event: Event) {
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |         viewModelScope.launch { _uiEvent.emit(event) }
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     }
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | 
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     protected suspend fun <T> call(
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |         callFlow: Flow<T>,
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |         completionHandler: (collect: T) -> Unit = {}
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     ) {
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |         callFlow
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |             .catch { }
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |             .collect {
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |                 completionHandler.invoke(it)
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |             }
| MCP:fMKRJ3 |     }
| MCP:fMKRJ3 | }
